info.title: Contact information
info.bookingDesc: Book your session and pay the 50% deposit directly online to secure your date.
info.responseDetail: We respond to all messages within 24 hours. For an immediate response write to us on WhatsApp.

booking.title: Prefer to talk before booking?
booking.subtitle: Schedule a free 15-minute video call to tell us about your session, ask questions and coordinate all the details before confirming your booking.
booking.note: You can also write to us directly on WhatsApp and we will reply within minutes.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions before booking a session in Santo Domingo.
faq.q1: Is a deposit required to book?
faq.a1: Yes — we require a non-refundable deposit of 50% of the total cost upon booking confirmation. The remaining 50% is paid on the day of the session before we begin.
faq.q2: Can I change the date of my session?
faq.a2: Yes — we allow one date change up to 72 hours before the session, subject to availability and at no additional cost.
faq.q3: When do I receive the photos after the session?
faq.a3: Edited high-resolution photos are delivered within 48-72 hours through a private online gallery ready to download.
faq.q4: Do you work with international clients?
faq.a4: Yes — most of our wedding and Punta Cana session clients are international. We speak Spanish and English.

dronePage.heroTitle: Drone Services for Weddings, Real Estate, and Hotels in Punta Cana
dronePage.heroDescription: Professional aerial production for projects in Punta Cana and Santo Domingo. We deliver clean framing, stable 4K footage, and social-ready edits.
dronePage.whatsappMessage: Hello! I need drone services in Punta Cana/Santo Domingo.
dronePage.cardOneBody: Dynamic aerial moments for ceremonies, receptions, and destination weddings with legal and safe flight planning.
dronePage.cardTwoBody: Aerial photo and video that make listings stand out with layout clarity, location context, and premium visual quality.
dronePage.cardThreeBody: Hero shots, social clips, and launch visuals tailored for hospitality brands and tourism marketing teams.
dronePage.sectionOneTitle: How we run each drone project
dronePage.sectionOneBody: We start with your objective, location conditions, and deliverable format. Then we define timing, weather windows, and flight route so your coverage stays efficient and predictable.
dronePage.sectionTwoBody: You receive edited aerial photos and stabilized video clips in formats ready for web, social media, and paid campaigns. Turnaround is optimized for fast publishing.
dronePage.sectionThreeBody: Our core coverage includes Punta Cana, Bavaro, Cap Cana, and Santo Domingo. We also coordinate nearby destinations in the Dominican Republic for weddings and commercial shoots.
dronePage.finalTitle: Need premium aerial content for your next project?
dronePage.finalBody: Tell us your location, date, and goals. We will send a clear scope, timeline, and quote for your drone production.
